message:
fix(http2, transport, sync): security and protocol fixes from deep code review

HTTP/2 Security & Protocol Fixes:
- Fix DoS vulnerability: DEFAULT_MAX_CONCURRENT_STREAMS u32::MAX -> 256
- Fix DoS vulnerability: DEFAULT_MAX_HEADER_LIST_SIZE u32::MAX -> 64KB
- Enforce max_frame_size when sending DATA frames (RFC 7540 compliance)
- Add CONTINUATION frame support for large header blocks
- Add header fragment size limit to prevent memory exhaustion via unbounded CONTINUATION frames

Race Condition Fixes:
- server/connection.rs: Fix check-then-wait race with register-first pattern
- signal/shutdown.rs: Fix check-then-wait race with register-first pattern

Transport Channel Fixes:
- sink.rs, stream.rs, mock.rs: Prevent unbounded waker queue growth with tracked waiter pattern

Sync Improvements:
- once_cell.rs: Enhanced race condition handling

Conformance Test Improvements:
- Remove flaky timing assertions in neg_ch_005
- Fix task completion waiting in rt_010 stress test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
